content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Section 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位名叫 Mark Bergen 的经理讲话，他在一家名为 Johnson
content.en_text: You will hear a manager called Mark Bergen, who works for a large retailer called Johnson

content.cn_text: Jones 的大型零售公司工作，正在招聘会上做介绍。
content.en_text: Jones, giving a talk at a recruitment fair.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第3页的第11至第15题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 15 on page 3.

content.cn_text: 你将听到 Johnson Jones 的一位经理在招聘会上做介绍。
content.en_text: You will hear a manager call from Johnson Jones, giving a talk at a recruitment fair.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至第15题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 15.

content.cn_text: 早上好。
content.en_text: Good morning.

content.cn_text: 我叫 Mark Bergen。
content.en_text: My name is Mark Bergen.

content.cn_text: 我是 Johnson Jones 的人力资源经理，今天来向大家介绍在这家
content.en_text: I'm a human resources manager at Johnson Jones and I'm here to tell you about what it's

content.cn_text: 全国最佳雇主之一的公司工作是什么样的。
content.en_text: like working for one of the country's best employers.

content.cn_text: 公司拥有225家百货商店，另外还拥有150家超市。
content.en_text: The company has 225 department stores and owns a further 150 supermarkets.

content.cn_text: 在我们最近一家新店开业时，750个职位收到了9000多份申请。
content.en_text: At our latest store opening, we had over 9,000 applicants for 750 posts.

content.cn_text: 那么，为什么这么多人想为我们工作呢？
content.en_text: So why do so many people want to work for us?

content.cn_text: 首先吸引他们的并不是薪水，虽然我们的薪水
content.en_text: Well, the first thing that attracts them isn't so much the salary, although that is a

content.cn_text: 略高于平均水平，而是可以享受高达25%的折扣，从洗衣机到
content.en_text: little above average, it's the idea of getting a massive 25% off everything from washing

content.cn_text: 名牌手提包，所有商品都能打折。
content.en_text: machines to designer handbags.

content.cn_text: 人们愿意长时间工作，以获得这类福利。
content.en_text: People are prepared to put in long hours to get those kinds of perks.

content.cn_text: Johnson Jones 已经稳健经营了将近150年，并且比许多最强的
content.en_text: Johnson Jones has been going strong for nearly 150 years and has outlived many of its strongest

content.cn_text: 竞争对手都存在得更久。
content.en_text: competitors.

content.cn_text: 当然，这与我们销售的高质量产品有关，
content.en_text: Of course, this has something to do with the high quality products that we sell and

content.cn_text: 也与我们的口号“花更少钱买更好商品”有关，这意味着顾客知道自己买得很值。
content.en_text: our motto better for less, which means customers know they are getting good value for money.

content.cn_text: 但在这一点上，我们并不是唯一的公司。
content.en_text: But we're not alone in that.

content.cn_text: 我们真正不同的是盈利方式。
content.en_text: Where we are different is in our approach to making a profit.

content.cn_text: 其他公司考虑短期利益，而我们总是采取更具战略性的视角，
content.en_text: Other companies think in the short term, whereas we always take a more strategic view,

content.cn_text: 着眼于三年或五年之后。
content.en_text: looking three or five years ahead.

content.cn_text: 公司并不归某个家族或股东所有。
content.en_text: The company isn't owned by a family or shareholders.

content.cn_text: 它是一种合伙制，这意味着公司由全职员工所有，他们都是合伙人，
content.en_text: It's a partnership, which means it's owned by its full-time employees, who are all partners

content.cn_text: 并持有公司份额。
content.en_text: and have a share in the company.

content.cn_text: 作为获得丰厚福利的回报，他们需要付出额外努力，
content.en_text: In return for the very generous benefits they get, they're expected to put in extra effort

content.cn_text: 并积极参与公司的运营。
content.en_text: and take an active role in running the company.

content.cn_text: 这意味着他们会参与一些事务，比如决定养老金缴款等。
content.en_text: This means they're involved in things like making decisions about pension contributions,

content.cn_text: 例如。
content.en_text: for example.

content.cn_text: 另一个非常有吸引力的工作理由是年度奖金，奖金按
content.en_text: Another very attractive reason for working for us is the annual bonus, which we get as

content.cn_text: 工资的一定比例发放。
content.en_text: a percentage of our salary.

content.cn_text: 去年是15%，大约相当于两个月工资，这是相当标准的水平。
content.en_text: Last year it was 15%, about two months salary, which is pretty standard.

content.cn_text: 它有时会降到8%，但那很少见，也有几次甚至超过20%。
content.en_text: It can go down to 8%, but that's unusual, and a couple of times it's even been above 20%.

content.cn_text: 有些人用它还贷款，另一些人把它存起来作为买房首付。
content.en_text: Some people use it to pay off loans, others save it for a deposit on a house.

content.cn_text: 对合伙人来说最受欢迎的福利是公司拥有的补贴度假中心，
content.en_text: The most popular benefit for partners are the subsidized holiday centers, which are owned

content.cn_text: 这些中心归公司所有。
content.en_text: by the company.

content.cn_text: 合伙人每年可以预订最多两周。
content.en_text: Once a year partners can book in for up to two weeks.

content.cn_text: 这项福利面向所有人，从清洁工到董事都可以，只要至少服务满三个月。
content.en_text: It's for anyone, from cleaners to directors, with a minimum of three months service.

content.cn_text: 服务满六个月后，合伙人可以获得住宿费用补贴。
content.en_text: After six months service, partners are entitled to offer their subsidy on the cost of their

content.cn_text: 住宿费用。
content.en_text: stay.

content.cn_text: 在听讲座的剩余部分之前，你有一些时间查看第4页的第16至第20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 16-20 on

content.cn_text: 第4页。
content.en_text: page 4.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第16至第20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 16-20.

content.cn_text: 我来简单介绍一下这些度假中心提供的内容。
content.en_text: Let me just give you an idea of what's on offer at the holiday centers.

content.cn_text: The Grange 是最大的度假中心，公司会用它来举办会议，
content.en_text: The Grange, which is the largest of the holiday centers, is used for conferences by the company,

content.cn_text: 董事会总是在那里举行年度会议。
content.en_text: and the board of directors always have their annual meeting there.

content.cn_text: 整体氛围很轻松，不像普通会议中心。
content.en_text: It's all very informal, not like a normal conference centre.

content.cn_text: Meadow House 位于 Kent，那里以苹果和其他水果闻名，
content.en_text: Meadow House is located in Kent, which is famous for its apples and other fruit, and it's

content.cn_text: 它是一座大型乡间住宅。
content.en_text: a large country house.

content.cn_text: 它不同寻常的地方在于，不像其他酒店，你可以使用厨房，所以
content.en_text: What's unusual about it is that, unlike other hotels, you have access to the kitchen, so

content.cn_text: 感觉更像是住在朋友家里。
content.en_text: it feels more like staying with a friend.

content.cn_text: Coombe Manor 是一个仍在运营的农场。
content.en_text: Coombe Manor is a working farm.

content.cn_text: 那里有很多牛和羊，但它们实际上不会出现在我们的超市货架上。
content.en_text: There are loads of cows and sheep, none of which actually end up on our supermarket shelves.

content.cn_text: 那里是孩子们的天堂，因为有大量空间可以尽情奔跑，还有一个室内泳池。
content.en_text: It's a paradise for kids, as there's plenty of space to run wild and also an indoor pool.

content.cn_text: 你可以选择住在小屋里，或者在湖边露营。
content.en_text: You can choose to stay in cottages or camp by the lake.

content.cn_text: The Barn 是我最近庆祝25周年结婚纪念日的地方。
content.en_text: The Barn is where I recently celebrated my 25th wedding anniversary.

content.cn_text: 你可以把整个地方租下来，供最多40人的大型朋友团体使用。
content.en_text: You can rent the whole place out for a large group of up to 40 friends.

content.cn_text: 我们所有食物都是从最近的 Johnson Jones 超市送来的，所以不用
content.en_text: We got all our food delivered from the nearest Johnson Jones supermarket, so there was no

content.cn_text: 自己做饭。
content.en_text: cooking to be done.

content.cn_text: 很完美。
content.en_text: Perfect.

content.cn_text: 唯一缺少的是水疗设施，预计明年开放。
content.en_text: All that was missing was the spa, which should be opening next year.

content.cn_text: The Stable 通常很难订到，因为它非常受欢迎，部分原因是
content.en_text: The Stable is often hard to get into because it's so popular, that's partly because

content.cn_text: 它就在海滩边，海景优美，而且从伦敦坐火车只需一小时。
content.en_text: it's right on the beach with beautiful sea views and only an hour by train from London.

content.cn_text: 非常适合周末短途休闲。
content.en_text: Ideal for weekends.

content.cn_text: 公司的帆船俱乐部也在那里，是由公司创始人
content.en_text: The company's sailing club is located there, which was started by the company's founder

content.cn_text: 于1885年创办的。
所以我相信大家都会同意，这里确实有……
content.en_text: So I'm sure you'll all agree that there really is.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 2.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第5页第三部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 3 on page 5.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C
groups.title: Questions 11–15

items.title: What does Mark say first attracts people to working for Johnson Jones?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问 Mark 说最先吸引人们来 Johnson Jones 工作的是什么。原文先否定 salary，然后说可以 getting a massive 25% off，对应 B. the staff discount。

items.title: Mark says the company is one of the country’s most successful retailers because it

options.title: A
options.content: is focused on long term planning.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问公司成为最成功零售商之一的原因。原文说不同之处在于 always take a more strategic view, looking three or five years ahead，对应 A. is focused on long term planning。

items.title: Mark says that because Johnson Jones is a partnership, the staff
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问因为 Johnson Jones 是合伙制，员工会怎样。原文说员工 take an active role in running the company，并参与决策，说明他们承担更多责任，对应 C. are given more responsibility。

items.title: What is the typical annual bonus that partners receive?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问合伙人通常收到的年度奖金是多少。原文说 Last year it was 15%，which is pretty standard，所以答案是 B. 15%。

items.title: To qualify for the leisure and holiday facilities, partners must have worked for the company for
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问要符合使用休闲和度假设施的资格，员工必须为公司工作多久。原文说 with a minimum of three months service，所以答案是 C. three months；six months 是获得住宿费用补贴的时间。

groups.desc: Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letter A–G.
groups.title: Questions 16–20

list.title: D
list.content: also supplies food to the company’s supermarkets

list.title: F
list.content: similar to being in someone’s home

items.title: The Grange
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问 The Grange 的信息。原文说 the board of directors always have their annual meeting there，说明它经常被高级管理层使用，对应 C. regularly used by senior management。

items.title: Meadow House
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 Meadow House 的信息。原文说 it feels more like staying with a friend，对应 F. similar to being in someone’s home。

items.title: Coombe Manor
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 Coombe Manor 的信息。原文说 It's a paradise for kids，说明适合带孩子的家庭，对应 B. suitable for families with children。

items.title: The Barn
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问 The Barn 的信息。原文说 Mark 在那里 celebrated my 25th wedding anniversary，并且可供 up to 40 friends 使用，说明适合庆祝和聚会，对应 A. available for celebrations and parties。

items.title: The Stable
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问 The Stable 的信息。原文说 only an hour by train from London，并且 Ideal for weekends，对应 G. good for short breaks。
